---
title: "circadiaBase Docker"
subtitle: "Reproducible research environment for chronobiology"
description: "A Docker template bundling a full chronobiology and actigraphy analysis stack — Jupyter + RStudio — launchable with a single command."
date: "2024-06-01"
image: ../images/circadiabase_docker.svg
categories: [Infrastructure, Docker, Python, R]
---

## About

circadiaBase Docker is a reproducible containerised environment for chronobiology and actigraphy research. It bundles a Jupyter notebook server and an RStudio server into a single Docker Compose setup, so any lab member can spin up a full analysis stack with one command, regardless of their local OS.

The environment pins all critical dependencies to ensure reproducibility across machines and time.

## Stack

**Python (Jupyter)**

- Python 3.11
- pyActigraphy, NumPy, scikit-learn, and more

**R (RStudio)**

- R 4.4 (rocker/rstudio)
- GGIR, ActCR, circacompare, cosinor, lunaR
- brms, rstanarm, lme4, lmerTest
- tidyverse, ggplot2 extensions

## Links

- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/circadiaBase_Docker)
